translations.The server could not complete the reques: The server could not complete the request. You can try again. If the problem remains, your administrator can check the server log.
translations.The server could not run the search. Try: The server could not run the search. Try again in a moment, or use manual entry below.
translations.The server rejected the data. Check the: The server rejected the data. Check the form values and try again, or use your organization’s help channel.

translations.The user “%s” was not found in Nextcloud: The user “%s” was not found in Nextcloud. Use the exact account login name.
translations.The warning threshold must be lower than: The warning threshold must be lower than the critical threshold.
translations.There is no internet connection right no: There is no internet connection right now. ProjectCheck needs a connection for most features. When you are back online, use Try again to reload.
translations.These are account login names (not displ: These are account login names (not display names). Search, pick people, or open “Manual entry” to type or paste one ID per line.
translations.These people can open ProjectCheck setti: These people can open ProjectCheck settings and this page. System administrators are always included. Search, add, or use manual entry; one login name per line.
translations.These settings are security-relevant. Wr: These settings are security-relevant. Wrong allowlists or administrators can lock people out of the app or grant access too widely. If you are unsure, make a small change and test with a second account before you rely on the result.
translations.These users can open ProjectCheck settin: These users can open ProjectCheck settings and the in-app organization page. System administrators are always included.
translations.This customer doesn't have any projects: This customer doesn't have any projects yet.

translations.This hourly rate was stored when the ent: This hourly rate was stored when the entry was saved and is not recalculated.
translations.This page only includes projects and sta: This page only includes projects and statistics you are allowed to access for this customer.
translations.This person is already on all projects y: This person is already on all projects you can manage.
translations.This project is archived. It is read-onl: This project is archived. It is read-only. To log time or edit details, reactivate it to Active or On Hold using "Change status".
translations.This project uses a separate hourly rate: This project uses a separate hourly rate for each team member. Search for a person, then enter their rate before adding them.
translations.This project uses one fixed hourly rate: This project uses one fixed hourly rate for everyone. Your entry will be billed at that project rate.
translations.This project uses per-person rates. Add: This project uses per-person rates. Add this person on the project team page with their rate.
translations.This project uses per-person rates. Open: This project uses per-person rates. Open the project team page to add this person with their rate.
translations.This project uses your organisation-wide: This project uses your organisation-wide employee hourly rate. Make sure a rate is effective for you on the work date.
translations.This rate applies to all time they log o: This rate applies to all time they log on this project from today. You can set a new rate with an effective date later.
translations.This status change is not allowed for th: This status change is not allowed for the current project state.
translations.This time entry would exceed the project: This time entry would exceed the project budget
translations.Time cannot be logged on this project. O: Time cannot be logged on this project. Only Active and On Hold projects accept new entries.
Time cannot be logged on this project. Only Active and On Hold projects accept new entries; reactivate an archived project if needed.
translations.Time entries cannot be moved to a projec: Time entries cannot be moved to a project that is not Active or On Hold.
translations.The start date must be on or before the: The start date must be on or before the end date.
translations.Time entry information and associated de: Time entry information and associated details
translations.Time tracking is not available for this: Time tracking is not available for this project status. Change status to Active or On Hold to add entries.
translations.Tip: save this form first if you have un: Tip: save this form first if you have unsaved changes — leaving the page will discard them.
translations.To avoid mistakes, use “Change status” o: To avoid mistakes, use “Change status” on the project page: transitions are validated there. Archiving removes the project from the default list and stops new time entries until you reactivate.

translations.Unexpected response. Reload the page and: Unexpected response. Reload the page and check that the app is up to date, or try again in a few minutes.

translations.Use a 3-letter ISO code like EUR, USD, o: Use a 3-letter ISO code like EUR, USD, or CHF. Used across budgets, rates, totals, and exports.
Use the calendar or type the work date. Future dates are not allowed.

translations.We could not save your settings. Please: We could not save your settings. Please try again.
translations.When access restriction is on, at least: When access restriction is on, at least one allowed user or one allowed group is required.
translations.When enabled, only the users and group m: When enabled, only the users and group members listed below (plus system administrators) can use the app. The app is hidden from the top bar for everyone else.

translations.You are logging time as an administrator: You are logging time as an administrator
translations.You are not allowed to search the direct: You are not allowed to search the directory. If this is unexpected, reload the page, or use manual entry below.
translations.You are not on this project team, but yo: You are not on this project team, but your administrator role lets you record your own time here.
translations.You are not on this project team. Your a: You are not on this project team. Your administrator role lets you record your own time here only.
translations.You can log time on this project because: You can log time on this project because of your administrator role, not because you are on the team.
translations.You can log time only for projects with: You can log time only for projects with status Active or On Hold that you can access (creator, admin, or active team member).
translations.You can only open your own employee prof: You can only open your own employee profile unless you are an administrator.

You can upload up to 20 files at once.

translations.You do not have permission to save. If y: You do not have permission to save. If you are not a system administrator, you may have been removed from the app’s administrator list. Reload the page.
